title: The Sea.
content:
Sad is the lonely sea - 
     So vast, and smooth, and grey
    It stretches far from me.
    Sad is the lonely sea!
    Its cheerful colours flee
     Before the fading day.
    Sad is the lonely sea
     So vast, and smooth, and grey!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Bewsher, titled "The Sea.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
